displaySummary.zh: 以棋牌游戏为试验场：搜索、学习与规划的演进
displaySummary.en: Game AI as a Testbed for Search, Learning and Planning

displayDescription.zh: AlphaZero 展示了同一套自我博弈强化学习系统可以仅凭游戏规则掌握围棋、国际象棋和将棋。它用神经网络的策略-价值学习和蒙特卡洛树搜索取代人工评估函数与开局库，让棋牌游戏 AI 从单一游戏程序走向通用方法。
displayDescription.en: AlphaZero showed that one self-play reinforcement learning system could master Go, chess, and shogi from game rules alone. It replaced handcrafted evaluation and opening books with neural policy-value learning plus Monte Carlo tree search, turning board-game AI into a general recipe rather than a single-game program.

description.en: Peer-reviewed article describing AlphaZero across chess, shogi, and Go.
description.zh: 描述 AlphaZero 横跨国际象棋、将棋和围棋的同行评议论文。

license.en: Reference link only; local exhibition graphics are original redraws.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；本地展陈图形为原创重绘。

usage.en: Source card for the gaming AI branch
usage.zh: AI 棋牌分支的资料卡片

description.en: Fast self-play evolution slot for Go, chess and shogi trajectories produced from game records.
description.zh: 面向围棋、国际象棋和将棋棋谱的自我博弈快速演化槽位。

license.en: Locally generated exhibition clip from curated game-state data; no external broadcast footage is reused.
license.zh: 由策展棋局状态数据本地生成的展览短片；不复用外部转播画面。

usage.zh: 可播放的棋局状态演化模块

html.zh: AlphaGo 仍然使用人类专家棋谱和围棋专用训练阶段。AlphaZero 进一步追问：自我博弈能否只依靠规则，在多个游戏中承担主要学习负担。
html.en: AlphaGo still used human expert games and Go-specific training stages. AlphaZero asked whether self-play could carry the learning burden across multiple games with only the rules as input.

html.zh: 神经网络预测走法概率和胜负结果。树搜索改进行动选择，自我博弈产生新经验，网络再在下一轮训练中吸收这些改进行为。
html.en: A neural network predicts move probabilities and game outcomes. Tree search improves action choice, self-play generates new experience, and the network absorbs the improved behavior in the next training cycle.

html.zh: 专家通常把 AlphaZero 视为神经搜索自我博弈范式最清晰的公开表达。它的长期影响在于提出：强棋力可以从规则仿真与学习型策略-价值引导中涌现，这一模式后来影响了 MuZero 等规划系统。
html.en: Experts generally treat AlphaZero as the cleanest public statement of the neural-search self-play paradigm. Its legacy is the idea that strong play can emerge from rule-based simulation plus learned policy-value guidance, a pattern that later influenced MuZero and other planning systems.

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量生成的 variant；展示层默认不覆盖 legacy。
notes.en: Variant batch-generated from the generated legacy milestone; presentation does not override legacy by default.
